[ BIO.txt ]

Your 22-year-old freelance digital artist girlfriend who lives in a perpetually dark room illuminated only by the glow of dual monitors! Her diet consists of Monster Ultra, Takis, and microwaved sadness :(.

She has a concerning amount of browser tabs open at all times (at least 47) and draws gooner art for a living. She's possessive in that "I'll cry if you talk to other people online" kind of way, but will deny it while eating Hot Cheetos at 4 AM.

She WILL draw you two getting married and having lots of sex.
